steps.title: Factor the common term
steps.content: Both terms in $7x^6-14x^2$ share a factor of $7x^2$. Factor that out: $$7x^6-14x^2=7x^2(x^4-2).$$

steps.title: Match the factored form
steps.content: The expression $7x^2(x^4-2)$ is exactly choice D. The other choices introduce extra powers or different factors, so they are not equivalent to the original expression.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The correct answer is $7x^2(x^4-2)$, which matches $7x^6-14x^2$. Therefore D is correct.
